title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
